detail: Harris Corp (HRS, already an S&P 500 member) renamed to L3Harris Technologies (LHX) on merger with L3; no 'set to join' release, no addition drift.

S&P announced Bemis (BMS) set to join; Amcor then completed its acquisition of Bemis (2019-06-11) and inherited the index spot as AMCR. The announced entity (Bemis) differs from the effective-date ticker (AMCR) -> not a clean addition event.
Torchmark (TMK, already an S&P 500 member) renamed to Globe Life (GL); no 'set to join' release, no addition drift.
Baker Hughes a GE Company (BHGE, already an S&P 500 member) reorganized/renamed to Baker Hughes Company (BKR) as GE reduced its stake; ticker change, not a fresh addition.
Symantec (SYMC, already an S&P 500 member) renamed to NortonLifeLock (NLOK) after selling its enterprise unit to Broadcom; ticker change, not a fresh addition.
HCP Inc (HCP, already an S&P 500 member) renamed to Healthpeak Properties (PEAK); ticker change, not a fresh addition.
ViacomCBS (VIAC) from the CBS+Viacom recombination; a merger-continuation, not a fresh addition. NOTE: this batch ALSO contains real add WRB, which IS resolved separately.
Truist Financial (TFC) from the BB&T (BBT) + SunTrust (STI) merger; a merger-continuation, not a fresh addition. NOTE: this batch ALSO contains real add ODFL, which IS resolved separately.
Jacobs Engineering (JEC, already an S&P 500 member) changed its NYSE ticker to 'J' on 2019-12-10 as a rebrand; ticker change, not a fresh addition.

Ingersoll-Rand plc (IR, already an S&P 500 member) renamed to Trane Technologies plc (TT) after spinning its industrial segment to merge with Gardner Denver; S&P confirmed Trane 'remains in the S&P 500'. Ticker change, not a fresh addition.

Raytheon Technologies (RTX) from the United Technologies (UTX, already an S&P 500 member) + Raytheon merger; a merger-continuation, not a fresh addition. NOTE: this batch ALSO contains real adds CARR and OTIS (UTX spinoffs), resolved separately.

Arconic Inc (ARNC, already an S&P 500 member) renamed to Howmet Aerospace (HWM) and spun off Arconic Corporation; HWM continues the old listing. No 'set to join' release; ticker/name change, not a fresh addition.
CenturyLink (CTL, already an S&P 500 member) rebranded to Lumen Technologies (LUMN) in Sept 2020; ticker change, not a fresh addition.

Viatris (VTRS) formed by Mylan (MYL, already an S&P 500 member) combining with Pfizer's Upjohn business; S&P treated VTRS as the successor to Mylan (Mylan removed, Viatris added same day). No 'set to join' release; a merger-completion continuation, not a fresh addition.
L Brands Inc (LB, already an S&P 500 member) renamed to Bath & Body Works (BBWI) after spinning off Victoria's Secret (VSCO); ticker change, not a fresh addition.
Coterra Energy (CTRA) is the merger of Cabot Oil & Gas (COG, already an S&P 500 member) with Cimarex Energy; COG continued as CTRA. Ticker/name change on merger completion, not a fresh addition.
Willis Towers Watson (WLTW, already an S&P 500 member) changed its NASDAQ ticker to WTW in Jan 2022 after the abandoned Aon merger; ticker change, not a fresh addition.
ViacomCBS (VIAC, already an S&P 500 member) renamed to Paramount Global (PARA) in Feb 2022; ticker change, not a fresh addition.
Warner Bros. Discovery (WBD) from Discovery Inc (DISCA, already an S&P 500 member) merging with AT&T's WarnerMedia; Discovery continued as WBD. Merger-completion continuation, not a fresh addition.
Ball Corporation (BLL, already an S&P 500 member) changed its NYSE ticker to BALL in 2022; ticker change, not a fresh addition.
Facebook Inc (FB, already an S&P 500 member) renamed to Meta Platforms (META), ticker FB->META effective 2022-06-09; ticker change, not a fresh addition.
Anthem Inc (ANTM, already an S&P 500 member) renamed to Elevance Health (ELV), ticker ANTM->ELV effective 2022-06-28; ticker change, not a fresh addition.
NortonLifeLock (NLOK, already an S&P 500 member) renamed to Gen Digital (GEN) after merging with Avast, ticker NLOK->GEN effective 2022-11-08; ticker change, not a fresh addition.
PerkinElmer (PKI, already an S&P 500 member) renamed to Revvity (RVTY) after divesting its analytical/enterprise business; ticker change, not a fresh addition.
Fiserv (FISV, already an S&P 500 member) changed its NASDAQ ticker to FI in 2023; ticker change, not a fresh addition.
Everest Re Group (RE, already an S&P 500 member) renamed to Everest Group (EG), ticker RE->EG; ticker change, not a fresh addition.
AmerisourceBergen (ABC, already an S&P 500 member) renamed to Cencora (COR), ticker ABC->COR; ticker change, not a fresh addition.
Ceridian HCM (CDAY, already an S&P 500 member) renamed to Dayforce (DAY), ticker CDAY->DAY in 2024; ticker change, not a fresh addition.
Healthpeak (PEAK, already an S&P 500 member) merged with Physicians Realty Trust and changed its ticker PEAK->DOC in 2024; ticker/merger continuation, not a fresh addition.
FLEETCOR Technologies (FLT, already an S&P 500 member) renamed to Corpay (CPAY), ticker FLT->CPAY in 2024; ticker change, not a fresh addition.
